## Summary
Describe the changes made in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have updated BOTH `front_end/src/schema/graph.ts` and `back_end/internal/graph/schema.go` (if applicable).
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` in `front_end/`.
- [ ] I have run `go test ./...` and `go vet ./...` in `back_end/`.
- [ ] I have run `golangci-lint run ./...` in `back_end/` if it is available locally.
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` or `documents/` if the user-facing workflow changed.

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots or diagrams in `documents/images/` to help explain your changes.
